name: the-5-love-languages
description: Gary Chapman's The 5 Love Languages — relationship toolkit for understanding how people give and receive love and how to express heartfelt commitment in ways your partner can actually feel
useCase: Discover your love language and your partner's, learn to speak each of the five love languages, fill the love tank, and build lasting relationships
knownRisks: The framework simplifies complex human relationships into five categories — not every relationship issue can be reduced to love languages
Chapman's Christian perspective may not resonate with all readers
The love languages concept has limited empirical validation from academic psychology
